rules.description: DHL customer account number (9 digits) used for shipment billing purposes.
Indicates who pays shipping charges — shipper, receiver, or third party.
Consignee contact details, generally no longer printed on label due to GDPR unless exceptional circumstances apply.
Shipper contact details, generally no longer printed on label due to GDPR unless exceptional circumstances apply.
Optional country-specific domestic routing code encoded within the routing barcode after the second '+' separator.
Optional customer logo graphic placed to the right of the sender address segment.
2D Data Matrix barcode (ECC 200) encoding operational data per ISO/IEC 15434 with public, open, and customer segments.
Declared monetary value of shipment contents for customs and insurance purposes.
Delivery date display on label showing day of month or special delivery instruction code (A, S, H).
2-digit numeric code in routing barcode indicating delivery date requirement (00=none, 01-31=day, 50=Saturday, 51=appointment, 52=hold).
Human-readable label representation of the delivery date, printed when a delivery date feature is selected.
Delivery time window display on label showing time constraint code (X09, X10, X12).
Single digit in routing barcode indicating delivery time requirement (0=none, 1=pre-09:00, 2=pre-12:00, 3=pre-10:30).
Text description of shipment contents, required for international non-document shipments for customs clearance.
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 destination country code encoded in routing barcode and displayed on label.
Complete DHL facility code (Country-ServiceArea-Facility) identifying the delivery facility in the manual sorting section.
Destination postcode encoded in routing barcode, no spaces or symbols allowed; omitted for countries without postcodes.
DHL-specific 3-letter code identifying the destination service area, displayed prominently for sorting and routing.
Mandatory DHL carrier logo graphic placed in the upper right corner of the transport label.
Length of the package (longest side) for volumetric weight calculation.
Width of the package for volumetric weight calculation.
Height of the package for volumetric weight calculation.
Unit of measure for package dimensions — CM for metric, IN for imperial.
3-digit numeric code in the routing barcode representing the sum of all product feature values, with leading zeroes.
Handling-relevant feature codes printed in reverse video format (white on black) in the handling feature segment.
Visual logos/icons indicating handling-relevant services such as the Medical EXPRESS Logo.
DHL Import Clearance Gateway name on Loose BBX Transport Labels.
First line of the import gateway address.
Second line of the import gateway address.
City name of the import gateway address.
State or province code of the import gateway address.
Postal code of the import gateway address.
ISO 2-letter country code of the import gateway address.
Sort code used at the inbound/destination facility for manual sorting, up to 4 alphanumeric characters.
Incoterms code defining duties and taxes payment responsibility for international shipments.
Unique identifier assigned by DHL GCoCL certifying the label is approved for production use, enclosed in asterisks.
Date on which the label was printed, in ISO 8601 yyyy-mm-dd format.
Heart shape with pulse line logo identifying Medical Express shipments, minimum 15x15mm.
3-letter DHL code identifying the origin service area or facility for routing purposes.
Sort code used at the outbound facility for manual sorting, up to 4 alphanumeric characters.
Piece number and total pieces in a shipment displayed as 'X of Y' or 'X/Y' format.
Unique piece-level identifier (license plate number) for individual package tracking within a shipment.
Primary piece identifier (license plate) encoded in Code 128 barcode with Data Identifier 'J', up to 35 alphanumeric characters.
Optional customer-defined reference identifier(s) for a package, qualified by Reference Type Codes.
Purchase order number associated with the shipment, typically provided by the consignee/buyer.
Composite line with printing application name, version, printing date, and label certification identifier separated by slashes.
2-digit numeric code identifying the DHL Express transport product, encoded within the routing barcode.
DHL's 3-character internal product code determining shipment handling, printed in reverse video for declarable shipments.
Global Product Short Name identifying the DHL Express transport product sold to the customer.
QR Code barcode used for DHL LabelFree scenarios, encoding operational data per ISO/IEC 18004.
Customer-defined reference number associated with the shipment for cross-referencing.
Return-to company or person name in the return address block.
First line of return street address.
Second line of return street address.
Return city name in the return address block.
State or province code in the return address block, required for US/CA/AU.
Return ZIP or postal code in the return address block.
ISO 2-letter country code in the return address block, required for international.
Code 128 or GS1-128 barcode encoding the DHL ISO Routing Code for automated sorting and routing.
Composite routing identifier used by DHL for operational sorting and routing within the global network.
Human-readable representation of the routing barcode data with parentheses around the Data Identifier.
3-letter code identifying the DHL service area at the origin, maintained in DHL Global Reference Databases.
DHL service level or product name identifying transit time and handling priority.
Shipper company or person name in the ship-from address block.
First line of street address in the ship-from address block.
Additional address line in the ship-from address block.
City name in the ship-from address block.
State, province, or equivalent postal location element in the ship-from address block.
Postal code in the ship-from address block.
ISO 3166 two-character country code in the ship-from address block.
Country name in the ship-from address block, mandatory for cross-border if ISO code is missing.
Consignee company or person name in the ship-to address block.
First line of street address in the ship-to address block.
Additional address line in the ship-to address block.
City name in the ship-to address block, must be printed in bigger font.
State, province, suburb, or equivalent postal location element in the ship-to address block.
Postal code in the ship-to address block, must be printed in bigger font.
ISO 3166 two-character country code in the ship-to address block.
Delivery country name in the ship-to address block, mandatory for cross-border and printed in bigger font.
The date the shipment is tendered to DHL or the label is created.
10-digit DHL waybill number (9 digits + MOD7 check digit) encoded in a Code 39 barcode.
Human-readable time feature handling text indicating delivery time commitment (X09, X10, or X12).
Primary machine-readable barcode encoding the DHL tracking/waybill number for package identification.
Primary DHL shipment tracking number (Air Waybill number) displayed as human-readable text.
Numeric weight value for piece and/or shipment weight; a dot indicates weight not yet known.
Unit of measurement for weight, either 'kg' or 'lb', printed after the weight value.

account_number.description: DHL customer account number (9 digits) used for shipment billing purposes.

billing_type.description: Indicates who pays shipping charges — shipper, receiver, or third party.

consignee_contact.description: Consignee contact details, generally no longer printed on label due to GDPR unless exceptional circumstances apply.

consignor_contact.description: Shipper contact details, generally no longer printed on label due to GDPR unless exceptional circumstances apply.

country_specific_routing_code.description: Optional country-specific domestic routing code encoded within the routing barcode after the second '+' separator.

customer_logo.description: Optional customer logo graphic placed to the right of the sender address segment.

data_matrix_2d.description: 2D Data Matrix barcode (ECC 200) encoding operational data per ISO/IEC 15434 with public, open, and customer segments.

declared_value.description: Declared monetary value of shipment contents for customs and insurance purposes.

delivery_date.description: Delivery date display on label showing day of month or special delivery instruction code (A, S, H).

delivery_date_code.description: 2-digit numeric code in routing barcode indicating delivery date requirement (00=none, 01-31=day, 50=Saturday, 51=appointment, 52=hold).

delivery_date_label_code.description: Human-readable label representation of the delivery date, printed when a delivery date feature is selected.

delivery_time.description: Delivery time window display on label showing time constraint code (X09, X10, X12).

delivery_time_code.description: Single digit in routing barcode indicating delivery time requirement (0=none, 1=pre-09:00, 2=pre-12:00, 3=pre-10:30).

description_of_goods.description: Text description of shipment contents, required for international non-document shipments for customs clearance.

destination_country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 destination country code encoded in routing barcode and displayed on label.

destination_facility_code.description: Complete DHL facility code (Country-ServiceArea-Facility) identifying the delivery facility in the manual sorting section.

destination_postcode.description: Destination postcode encoded in routing barcode, no spaces or symbols allowed; omitted for countries without postcodes.

destination_service_area_code.description: DHL-specific 3-letter code identifying the destination service area, displayed prominently for sorting and routing.

dhl_logo.description: Mandatory DHL carrier logo graphic placed in the upper right corner of the transport label.

dimensions_length.description: Length of the package (longest side) for volumetric weight calculation.

dimensions_width.description: Width of the package for volumetric weight calculation.

dimensions_height.description: Height of the package for volumetric weight calculation.

dimensions_unit.description: Unit of measure for package dimensions — CM for metric, IN for imperial.

handling_feature_code.description: 3-digit numeric code in the routing barcode representing the sum of all product feature values, with leading zeroes.

handling_feature_codes.description: Handling-relevant feature codes printed in reverse video format (white on black) in the handling feature segment.

handling_service_logos.description: Visual logos/icons indicating handling-relevant services such as the Medical EXPRESS Logo.

import_point_of_entry_address_name.description: DHL Import Clearance Gateway name on Loose BBX Transport Labels.

import_point_of_entry_address_address_li.description: First line of the import gateway address.
Second line of the import gateway address.

import_point_of_entry_address_city.description: City name of the import gateway address.

import_point_of_entry_address_state.description: State or province code of the import gateway address.

import_point_of_entry_address_postal_cod.description: Postal code of the import gateway address.

import_point_of_entry_address_country.description: ISO 2-letter country code of the import gateway address.

inbound_sort_code.description: Sort code used at the inbound/destination facility for manual sorting, up to 4 alphanumeric characters.

incoterms.description: Incoterms code defining duties and taxes payment responsibility for international shipments.

label_certification_identifier.description: Unique identifier assigned by DHL GCoCL certifying the label is approved for production use, enclosed in asterisks.

label_printing_date.description: Date on which the label was printed, in ISO 8601 yyyy-mm-dd format.

medical_express_logo.description: Heart shape with pulse line logo identifying Medical Express shipments, minimum 15x15mm.

origin_service_area_code.description: 3-letter DHL code identifying the origin service area or facility for routing purposes.

outbound_sort_code.description: Sort code used at the outbound facility for manual sorting, up to 4 alphanumeric characters.

piece_count.description: Piece number and total pieces in a shipment displayed as 'X of Y' or 'X/Y' format.

piece_id.description: Unique piece-level identifier (license plate number) for individual package tracking within a shipment.

piece_identifier.description: Primary piece identifier (license plate) encoded in Code 128 barcode with Data Identifier 'J', up to 35 alphanumeric characters.

piece_shipment_reference.description: Optional customer-defined reference identifier(s) for a package, qualified by Reference Type Codes.

po_number.description: Purchase order number associated with the shipment, typically provided by the consignee/buyer.

printing_application_identifier.description: Composite line with printing application name, version, printing date, and label certification identifier separated by slashes.

product_code.description: 2-digit numeric code identifying the DHL Express transport product, encoded within the routing barcode.

product_content_code.description: DHL's 3-character internal product code determining shipment handling, printed in reverse video for declarable shipments.

product_name.description: Global Product Short Name identifying the DHL Express transport product sold to the customer.

qr_code.description: QR Code barcode used for DHL LabelFree scenarios, encoding operational data per ISO/IEC 18004.

reference_number.description: Customer-defined reference number associated with the shipment for cross-referencing.

return_address_name.description: Return-to company or person name in the return address block.

return_address_address_line_1.description: First line of return street address.

return_address_address_line_2.description: Second line of return street address.

return_address_city.description: Return city name in the return address block.

return_address_state.description: State or province code in the return address block, required for US/CA/AU.

return_address_postal_code.description: Return ZIP or postal code in the return address block.

return_address_country.description: ISO 2-letter country code in the return address block, required for international.

routing_barcode.description: Code 128 or GS1-128 barcode encoding the DHL ISO Routing Code for automated sorting and routing.

routing_code.description: Composite routing identifier used by DHL for operational sorting and routing within the global network.

routing_code_human_readable.description: Human-readable representation of the routing barcode data with parentheses around the Data Identifier.

service_area_code_origin.description: 3-letter code identifying the DHL service area at the origin, maintained in DHL Global Reference Databases.

service_type.description: DHL service level or product name identifying transit time and handling priority.

ship_from_address_name.description: Shipper company or person name in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_address_line_1.description: First line of street address in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_address_line_2.description: Additional address line in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_city.description: City name in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_state.description: State, province, or equivalent postal location element in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_postal_code.description: Postal code in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_country_code.description: ISO 3166 two-character country code in the ship-from address block.

ship_from_address_country_name.description: Country name in the ship-from address block, mandatory for cross-border if ISO code is missing.

ship_to_address_name.description: Consignee company or person name in the ship-to address block.

ship_to_address_address_line_1.description: First line of street address in the ship-to address block.

ship_to_address_address_line_2.description: Additional address line in the ship-to address block.

ship_to_address_city.description: City name in the ship-to address block, must be printed in bigger font.

ship_to_address_state.description: State, province, suburb, or equivalent postal location element in the ship-to address block.

ship_to_address_postal_code.description: Postal code in the ship-to address block, must be printed in bigger font.

ship_to_address_country_code.description: ISO 3166 two-character country code in the ship-to address block.

ship_to_address_country_name.description: Delivery country name in the ship-to address block, mandatory for cross-border and printed in bigger font.

shipment_date.description: The date the shipment is tendered to DHL or the label is created.

shipment_identifier.description: 10-digit DHL waybill number (9 digits + MOD7 check digit) encoded in a Code 39 barcode.

time_feature_text.description: Human-readable time feature handling text indicating delivery time commitment (X09, X10, or X12).

tracking_barcode.description: Primary machine-readable barcode encoding the DHL tracking/waybill number for package identification.

tracking_number.description: Primary DHL shipment tracking number (Air Waybill number) displayed as human-readable text.

weight_value.description: Numeric weight value for piece and/or shipment weight; a dot indicates weight not yet known.

weight_unit.description: Unit of measurement for weight, either 'kg' or 'lb', printed after the weight value.
